title: Vampire
why_this_song: Vampire by Olivia Rodrigo (2023) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Six months of torture you sold as some forbidden paradise"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "'Cause I've made some real big mistakes"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "'Cause I've made some real big mistakes"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "'Cause I've made some real big mistakes"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "'Cause I've made some real big mistakes"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I should've known it was strange
You only come out at night
I used to think I was smart
But you made me look so naive
I've made some real big mistakes
But you make the worst one look fine
I should've known it was strange
You only come out at night

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "sold" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "sold" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "cause" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "cause" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Can't figure out just how you do it

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Look at you, cool guy, you got it
You only come out at night
'Cause how you think's the kind of thing

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Vampire" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Vampire" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Vampire" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Vampire", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Vampire" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Vampire" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
